CustomField.description: Lookup to the Reseller__c record that sourced this Opportunity. Auto-populated by OpportunityTriggerHandler based on Reseller_Email__c. If the Reseller is deleted, this field is set to null (the Opportunity survives).
CustomField.inlineHelpText: Auto-populated by the OpportunityTrigger when the Reseller Email matches a Reseller record. Do not edit manually.
CustomField.label: Reseller
